summary: Tested FLOWTYM V4 Navigation Restructuring - 8 Menus Métiers. All 8 main menus visible and working. Mega menu dropdowns for Operations, Revenue, Distribution, Guest, Marketing, Finance, Platform all functional with correct submenu items. New modules (Simulation & Devis, Finance, Maintenance) accessible and displaying correctly with KPIs and demo data. ONE BUG FOUND: After login, users are redirected to /pms/planning instead of /flowboard.

ui_bugs.issue: After login, admin users are redirected to /pms/planning instead of /flowboard. Line 33 in LoginPage.jsx has navigate('/pms/planning') which should be navigate('/flowboard')

passed_tests: 8 main menus visible in TopNavigation: Flowboard, Operations, Revenue, Distribution, Guest, Marketing, Finance, Platform
Operations mega menu dropdown shows 7 items: PMS & Planning, Check-in/out, Housekeeping, Maintenance, Staff, Consignes, Groups & MICE
Revenue mega menu dropdown shows 3 items: RMS & Pricing, Simulation & Devis, Rapports
Distribution mega menu dropdown shows 2 items: Booking Engine, Channel Manager
Guest mega menu dropdown shows 3 items: CRM & Clients, E-Réputation, Conciergerie
Marketing mega menu dropdown shows 2 items: Campagnes, Fidélité
Finance mega menu dropdown shows 2 items: Facturation, Comptabilité
Platform mega menu dropdown shows 4 items: Configuration, Data Hub, Intégrations, Utilisateurs
'Bientôt' badge visible on Groups & MICE, Conciergerie, Campagnes, Fidélité, Comptabilité, Utilisateurs
'Nouveau' badge visible on Simulation & Devis
Flowboard page accessible via /flowboard with KPIs and dashboard widgets
Simulation & Devis module accessible via /simulation with 5 KPIs (Total, Brouillons, Envoyés, Convertis, Taux conversion)
Simulation module shows workflow banner (Simulation → Devis PDF → Réservation)
Simulation module shows demo data table with multi-chambres and multi-périodes
Finance module accessible via /finance with 4 KPIs (CA Total, Encaissé, En attente, En retard)
Finance module shows 3 tabs (Factures, Paiements, Comptabilité)
Finance module shows invoice table with demo data
Maintenance module accessible via /maintenance with 5 KPIs (Total, Ouverts, En cours, Résolus, Urgents)
Maintenance module shows ticket table with demo data
Staff navigation works: /staff redirects to /staff/dashboard
CRM navigation works: /crm loads CRM page
RMS navigation works: /rms loads RMS page
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix LoginPage.jsx line 33 - change navigate('/pms/planning') to navigate('/flowboard') for default redirect after login
OPTIONAL: Also update App.jsx line 183 catch-all route from /pms/planning to /flowboard for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.jsx line 33: navigate('/pms/planning') should be navigate('/flowboard') per requirements
App.jsx line 183: catch-all route redirects to /pms/planning, should be /flowboard for consistency
TopNavigation.jsx is well-structured with MegaMenuDropdown component handling hover states properly
New modules (SimulationModule, FinanceModule, MaintenanceModule) use static demo data as expected (MOCKED)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working except default redirect bug)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data in modules
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation restructuring complete. 8 menus métiers working with mega menu dropdowns. New modules (Simulation, Finance, Maintenance) have MOCKED static data. Main bug: LoginPage redirects to /pms/planning instead of /flowboard after login.

mocked_apis_list: Simulation & Devis module - static demo data in SimulationModule.jsx
Finance module - static demo data in FinanceModule.jsx
Maintenance module - static demo data in MaintenanceModule.jsx
mocked_apis.note: All three new modules use hardcoded demo data for display purposes

default_redirect.status: BUG - needs fix in LoginPage.jsx line 33
